feed.title: Eric Hansen's Blog of Stuff - misc

entry.title: Welcome All
entry.summary:
The blog of a lifetime! Maybe… :D

I mostly plan on using this blog space for programming notes, challenges, etc… I’ll probably also share Christianity related stuff as well as desired.

To start I plan on doing a new-language-a-day marathon in December that I’m calling Programmer December.
entry.content:
The blog of a lifetime! Maybe… :D

I mostly plan on using this blog space for programming notes, challenges, etc… I’ll probably also share Christianity related stuff as well as desired.

To start I plan on doing a new-language-a-day marathon in December that I’m calling Programmer December.
